records.question: Which restaurants have the name Subway?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
WHERE restaurant.resname = 'Subway'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT ResID
FROM Restaurant
WHERE ResName = 'Subway'

records.question: Which restaurants named Honeygrow have visits where customers spent at least 13.2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
JOIN type_of_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = type_of_restaurant.resid
JOIN visits_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = visits_restaurant.resid
WHERE restaurant.resname = 'Honeygrow' AND visits_restaurant.spent >= 13.2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT r.ResID
FROM Restaurant r
INNER JOIN Visits_Restaurant v ON r.ResID = v.ResID
WHERE r.ResName = 'Honeygrow' AND v.Spent >= 13.2

records.question: Which restaurants have a rating that is exactly 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
WHERE restaurant.rating = 3
records.pred_sql:
SELECT ResID
FROM Restaurant
WHERE Rating = 3

records.question: Which restaurants with a rating of at most 4 were visited by students aged at most 20 who have an advisor number at least 8772 and spent exactly 13.2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
JOIN visits_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = visits_restaurant.resid
JOIN student ON visits_restaurant.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE visits_restaurant.spent = 13.2 AND student.age <= 20 AND student.advisor >= 8772 AND restaurant.rating <= 4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT R.ResID
FROM Student S
JOIN Visits_Restaurant V ON S.StuID = V.StuID
JOIN Restaurant R ON V.ResID = R.ResID
WHERE S.Age <= 20
  AND S.Advisor >= 8772
  AND V.Spent = 13.2
  AND R.Rating <= 4

JOIN type_of_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = type_of_restaurant.resid
WHERE restaurant.resname = 'Subway' AND restaurant.rating <= 3 AND restaurant.address LIKE '%Baltimore%'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT r.ResID
FROM Restaurant r
JOIN Type_Of_Restaurant tr ON r.ResID = tr.ResID
JOIN Restaurant_Type rt ON tr.ResTypeID = rt.ResTypeID
WHERE rt.ResTypeName = 'Subway'
  AND r.Address LIKE '%Baltimore%'
  AND r.Rating <= 3

records.question: Which Subway restaurants have visits where customers spent at least 6.53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
JOIN type_of_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = type_of_restaurant.resid
JOIN visits_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = visits_restaurant.resid
WHERE restaurant.resname = 'Subway' AND visits_restaurant.spent >= 6.53
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.ResID
FROM Restaurant r
JOIN Type_Of_Restaurant tr ON r.ResID = tr.ResID
JOIN Restaurant_Type rt ON tr.ResTypeID = rt.ResTypeID
JOIN Visits_Restaurant vr ON r.ResID = vr.ResID
WHERE rt.ResTypeName = 'Subway' AND vr.Spent >= 6.53

records.question: Which Honeygrow restaurants located in Baltimore have a rating of at most 4?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
WHERE restaurant.rating <= 4 AND restaurant.resname = 'Honeygrow' AND restaurant.address LIKE '%Baltimore%'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT r.ResID
FROM Restaurant r
JOIN Type_Of_Restaurant tr ON r.ResID = tr.ResID
JOIN Restaurant_Type rt ON tr.ResTypeID = rt.ResTypeID
JOIN Visits_Restaurant vr ON r.ResID = vr.ResID
JOIN Student s ON vr.StuID = s.StuID
WHERE rt.ResTypeName = 'Honeygrow'
AND s.city_code = 'Baltimore'
AND r.Rating <= 4

records.question: Which restaurants named Honeygrow have an address containing 3212 St Paul St and a rating of at least 4?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
WHERE restaurant.address LIKE '%3212 St Paul St%' AND restaurant.resname = 'Honeygrow' AND restaurant.rating >= 4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT ResID
FROM Restaurant
WHERE ResName = 'Honeygrow'
AND Address LIKE '%3212 St Paul St%'
AND Rating >= 4

records.question: Which restaurants named Honeygrow have been visited by students who are exactly 20 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
JOIN visits_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = visits_restaurant.resid
JOIN student ON visits_restaurant.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE restaurant.resname = 'Honeygrow' AND student.age = 20
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Restaurant.ResID
FROM Student
JOIN Visits_Restaurant ON Student.StuID = Visits_Restaurant.StuID
JOIN Restaurant ON Visits_Restaurant.ResID = Restaurant.ResID
WHERE Restaurant.ResName = 'Honeygrow' AND Student.Age = 20

records.question: Which restaurants serve Classic Chinese cooking and have a rating of at most 4?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
JOIN type_of_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = type_of_restaurant.resid
JOIN restaurant_type ON type_of_restaurant.restypeid = restaurant_type.restypeid
WHERE restaurant.rating <= 4 AND restaurant_type.restypedescription = 'Classic Chinese cooking.'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Restaurant.ResID
FROM Restaurant
INNER JOIN Type_Of_Restaurant ON Restaurant.ResID = Type_Of_Restaurant.ResID
INNER JOIN Restaurant_Type ON Type_Of_Restaurant.ResTypeID = Restaurant_Type.ResTypeID
WHERE Restaurant_Type.ResTypeDescription = 'Classic Chinese' AND Restaurant.Rating <= 4

records.question: What restaurants have a rating of at most 4?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
WHERE restaurant.rating <= 4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT ResID
FROM Restaurant
WHERE Rating <= 4
